# External Source Collections

## Purpose
Seed manifest for the broad external raw mirror planned for this companion KB.

## First-wave collections
| Collection | Priority | Anchor URLs |
|------------|----------|-------------|
| Public nbadb contract | P0 | `https://nbadb.w4w.dev`, `https://nbadb.w4w.dev/docs`, `https://nbadb.w4w.dev/sitemap.xml` |
| Upstream NBA API contract | P0 | `https://nba-api-sbang.readthedocs.io/en/latest/`, `https://github.com/swar/nba_api`, `https://cdn.nba.com/static/json/liveData/scoreboard/todaysScoreboard_00.json` |
| Distribution | P0 | `https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/wyattowalsh/basketball`, `https://pypi.org/project/nbadb/` |
| Data stack docs | P1 | `https://duckdb.org/llms.txt`, `https://duckdb.org/docs/current/index`, `https://docs.pola.rs/`, `https://pandera.readthedocs.io/en/stable/`, `https://sqlmodel.tiangolo.com/` |
| Tooling docs | P2 | `https://docs.astral.sh/uv/`, `https://typer.tiangolo.com/`, `https://textual.textualize.io/`, `https://github.com/wyattowalsh/proxywhirl` |
| Obsidian and Dataview | P2 | `https://help.obsidian.md/Home`, `https://blacksmithgu.github.io/obsidian-dataview/` |
